mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_run_log ( job_name, status, started_at, finished_at, total_count, attraction_count, sido_count, gugun_count, skipped_validation, skipped_fk, error_code, error_message) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{totalCount}, #{attractionCount}, #{sidoCount}, #{gugunCount}, #{skippedValidation}, #{skippedFk}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage})
